exception_title: GuardDuty cryptocurrency mining alert disabled for ML GPU instances
compensating_controls: CloudTrail monitoring for non-ML EC2 launches; CrowdStrike process monitoring on GPU instances; daily GPU utilization dashboard review; ML training jobs tagged with job-type=ml-training for audit
review_outcome: Renewed — no anomalous GPU activity detected. CrowdStrike confirmed no unauthorized processes on GPU instances.

exception_title: Delayed SIEM integration for trade-reconciliation-service due to FedRAMP log format requirements
compensating_controls: Service deployed September 10 in isolated subnet with no external access; CloudWatch Logs with 7-year retention configured; manual log review by compliance team twice per week; FedRAMP-compliant Fluent Bit parser in development
review_outcome: Expired — SIEM integration completed December 12. Parser deployed and validated. 14 alert rules configured.
